title: narcissus × biflorus var. dianthos
intro: Narcissus × biflorus var. dianthos, also known as the Daffodil or Jonquil, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Amaryllidaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its potential to be used as a natural remedy for various health issues, including respiratory problems, fever, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Narcissus × biflorus var. dianthos include its ability to act as an expectorant, helping to relieve congestion and coughs, as well as its antiseptic properties, which can aid in wound healing. The plant is typically prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, or infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
